attacks.scenario: 程序列舉 spawn bare 'powershell'/落 workspace cwd 被劫持、傳機密 env
attacks.failSafeTest: 絕對路徑 powershell.exe+shell:false+固定 systemRoot cwd+白名單 env；spy 斷言

attacks.scenario: Win32_Process JSON 缺欄/null/單物件 → parse 崩潰
attacks.failSafeTest: parseProcessJson 容錯：單物件/陣列/null name·cmd 一律不丟例外、當不匹配

attacks.scenario: 'node claude-x.js'/路徑含 claude 子字串誤判 running
attacks.failSafeTest: matchClaude 綁可執行 token(name/argv0 結尾)+只收 root 子樹；誤判案例全不匹配

attacks.scenario: lister hang → 輪詢卡死/重入堆疊
attacks.failSafeTest: single-flight + withTimeout backstop：永不 resolve 的 lister 放棄該輪沿用上次

attacks.scenario: 工作區數極大 → 輪詢退化忙迴圈/CPU 暴衝
attacks.failSafeTest: computePollInterval n=0/NaN/負/Infinity 皆落 [base,60s] 上界(REQ-MON-006)
